offers.name: The Dominance Stack
offers.description: The complete growth engine: 5-page website redesign, local SEO setup, and 90-day lead gen launch. Two revision rounds included — layout first, then copy and images. Site goes live when final payment is received.

split.label: $3,000 deposit today, $3,000 when site goes live

deliverables: 2 revision rounds — layout first, then copy and images
Google Business Profile setup + 10 local citations
Contact form with automated email notifications
bonuses: 90 days priority support — content edits, daily backups, security monitoring, malware sweeps ($1,800 value)
30-day SEO sprint — keyword research, on-page fixes, local map optimization ($1,800 value)
Competitor visibility analysis — top 3 competitors deconstructed ($900 value)
offers.bonus_condition: Paid in full only. Limited time.
offers.guarantee: Project delivered to agreed scope or we keep working until it is — revisions included. Site goes live only after final payment is received.
offers.flat_fee_guarantee: 2 revision rounds: layout review, then copy and images. Additional revisions at hourly rate.
offers.cancellation_policy: Cancel anytime after 30 days. No refunds on completed milestones.

script.hook: I got a visibility audit on your site and found a few 'revenue leaks' costing you thousands every month.
script.solution: We rebuild your website, set up local SEO, and build a lead flow that captures more business. Two revision rounds so you're never stuck with something you don't love. Site goes live only after your final payment clears — you're never paying for something you haven't seen.
script.payment_anchor: Standard structure is $3,000 deposit to start, $3,000 when the site goes live on your domain. Most clients prefer this because the second payment is tied to launch — you see it running before you pay for it.
script.paid_in_full_close: But if you pay in full today at $4,500 — that's $1,500 off and you get $4,500 in bonuses: 90 days priority support, a 30-day SEO sprint, and a competitor analysis. That's the offer for people ready to move fast.
script.launch_close: And the way this works is simple — your site goes live the same day your second payment comes in. No release before payment.
script.excluded: We don't do content writing, paid ads, or social posting — but we can refer trusted partners if you need those.
